title: Yaba Tablets Worth ₹16 Crore Seized by Assam Rifles and DRI in Tripura; One Person Nabbed
description: Assam Rifles, in a joint operation with the DRI, apprehended one individual from the general area of Teliamura in Khowai district, Tripura, on Saturday when a pickup vehicle was intercepted, leading to the recovery of approximately 2,00,000 Yaba tablets valued at around ₹16 crores.
